WEEKLY OPS ROW

ASA: ___  Abandon %: ___

CORRELATION READOUT · Period: _______

Strong patterns this window:
1. _______________ (r≈___)
2. _______________ (r≈___)

Plain conclusion: _______________
Action owner: _______________  Due: _______

CSAT DRIVER NARRATIVE

If ASA rises: expect abandon to rise; answer survey may fall.
If staff falls: watch ASA-abandon chain before blaming training.
Overall survey: least tied to answer alone; do not over-index one item.

STAFF CUT IMPACT REVIEW
Proposed cut: ___ FTE  Effective: _______

Last 8 weeks: staff vs ASA vs abandon trend attached.
CSAT at risk lanes: _______________
Decision: [ ] proceed  [ ] phase  [ ] reject

QBR OPS SLICE (data-backed)
Account: _______________  Period: _______________

Ops trend: ASA ___  Abandon ___  CSAT overall ___
Message: We manage support with correlated ops metrics, not anecdotes.

METRIC DISPUTE · WEEK CONTEXT
Employee/team: _______________  Metric: _______________

Attach: fiscal week row + matrix excerpt + written conclusion.
Rule: no ding without weekly context on file.
